stemHtml:
Refer to Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - VFR Chart ED-4.
Calculate the distance (NM) from MÜHLDORF to the top of descent (ToD), given:

An aircraft approaching airfield MÜHLDORF (EDMY, N48° 16.8' E012° 30.1') from the east on track 270°. The descent should be planned to arrive at an altitude of 3 500 ft approximately abeam of airfield ALTÖTTING (N48°13.0' E012°38.9'). Atmospheric conditions = ISA, TAS = 110 kt, average wind = 300°(T) / 16 kt, rate of descent = 500 ft/min, cruising level = FL125.
